name: scenic-ride-catalog
description: Static scenic cycling route catalog and fullscreen ride player.

scripts.check: node --check src/app.js && node --check scripts/build.js && node --check scripts/test-site.js && node --check scripts/validate-data.js && node --check scripts/serve-dist.js && npm run validate
scripts.build:all: node scripts/build.js pedalscape && node scripts/build.js beltscape
scripts.test:all: npm run test:pedalscape && npm run test:beltscape
